creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thanks for the suggestion, Gary, but there is no way to 
specify "suggested" dependencies. Those, that are specified 
are _required_. 

_Requiring_ ImageMagick (or GraphicsMagick) would not be right, 
because lyx comes up fine without them, and many (most?) documents 
have no embedded images. Even if images are present in a particular 
document, the user will be advised of the problem running "convert" 
-- there will be no crash.
